notes: This batch processes only the nested HEAT_DUMPS subtree under the moved-out-of-git cache root and treats it as historical rotation lineage, not as current authority.
The subtree contains 13 timestamped families across four semantics: A1-working slices, real-loop history slices, generic run rotations, and save-export rotations.
The earliest manifested run families use relative source and destination strings, while later run/save families switch to absolute workspace paths.
RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION__20260225T005815Z is the broad mixed demotion pivot: 53 moved families and 2 kept real-loop survivors.
RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION__20260225T010616Z and RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION__20260225T011409Z preserve repeated compact eight-object moved bundles under a rolling kept frontier.
SAVE_EXPORT_ROTATION__20260225T010624Z is a manifest-only shell that declares 8 kept artifacts and 0 moved artifacts while retaining only rotation_manifest.json.
RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION__20260225T050420Z is a payload-only run residue that keeps RUN_REAL_LOOP_DEEP_0025 without the outer rotation manifest.
SAVE_EXPORT_ROTATION__20260225T012831Z and SAVE_EXPORT_ROTATION__20260225T051154Z are payload-only save residues containing zips and sha256 sidecars but no manifest.
The subtree therefore preserves three packaging states at once: manifested rotations, manifest-only shell, and payload-only residue.
Late payload-only residue also preserves separate clocks between wrapper family timestamps and inner payload creation timestamps.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; no direct A2-1 or A1 promotion from this batch
source_family: archive heat dumps nested heat-dump rotation hub
